title: Form Description - Stop The Scroll
excerpt: In the Form Description at the top of of a form, if there is a great deal of text, the viewer is required to scroll to view all of it. A lot of important information may be missed if the form submitter does not scroll, s…

posts.author: cdc-ams (Ms. Mathville)
posts.cookedHtml: In the Form Description at the top of of a form, if there is a great deal of text, the viewer is required to scroll to view all of it. A lot of important information may be missed if the form submitter does not scroll, so we would like a better option for this section - an expanding window that fits all text in the description, or a pop-up modal, for example.

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml: Would also love the ability to input a small table of information like SLA data or similar!
